name: Bittersweet Chocolate Frosting
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 sticks Unsalted butter; sliced, room temperature
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, mix sugar, yolks, and corn syrup.
2. Simmer cream in a heavy 3-quart saucepan until warm.
3. Add both chocolates to the simmering cream and stir over low heat until smooth.
4. Remove from heat and stir in butter, then the sugar yolk mixture.
5. Cook over low heat until temperature reaches 165-170°F (about 10 minutes), stirring constantly.
6. Do not scrape the sides of the bowl (or the candy monster will bite).
7. Add vanilla.
8. Beat with a mixer until cool and spreadable, about 1 1/2 hours.
9. Use on Heirloom Chocolate Cake.
